36.reason: [The function does not handle the case when root is NULL, leading to potential segmentation fault when the tree is empty or during recursive calls on NULL children. Also, the traversal order is not in-order; it's post-order, which may not output leaf nodes from left to right as required.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The function does not handle the case when root is NULL, leading to potential segmentation fault when the tree is empty or during recursive calls on NULL children. Also, the traversal order is not in-order; it's post-order, which may not output leaf nodes from left to right as required.]

48.reason: [If n is 0, root remains NULL and passing NULL to printBst causes dereferencing of NULL pointer, leading to runtime crash.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If n is 0, root remains NULL and passing NULL to printBst causes dereferencing of NULL pointer, leading to runtime crash.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If n is 0, root remains NULL and passing NULL to printBst causes dereferencing of NULL pointer. Also, even for non-empty trees, printBst may access root->left/right without checking if root is NULL first.]
